response: guest i am stefan muller, seeking to join in2code in rosenheim as an apprentice for fachinformatiker für anwendungsentwicklung. guest i have a wirtschaftsschulabschluss and have broken my fachoberschule and verschule for abitur. guest i am passionate about it and have enjoyed programming in python in my free time. guest i am currently looking for an opportunity to start my career in this field. guest i am inspired by the work of florian brocker and am eager to contribute to in2code's innovative projects. guest i am ready to learn and grow in this role.
